creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Created attachment 252583
Update port to 4.4.0

This patch brings it up to date.
I decided to remove the port options and just build everything because updating the plist for each option is extremely tedious and we have package builders these days.

If someone wants to re-add the options and update the plist to suit I wouldn't object but I don't have the time to do it myself.
